vivid/color/bg/canvas.$description: The default page background colour, used as the base canvas for application layouts and large surface areas.

vivid/color/bg/inverse.$description: Use for high contrast page or component backgrounds.

vivid/color/bg/surface.$description: The background color for elements with the highest level of prominence, like a card.

vivid/color/bg/surface/hover.$description: The hover state color for elements with the highest level of prominence.

vivid/color/bg/surface/active.$description: The active state color for elements with the highest level of prominence.

vivid/color/bg/surface/selected.$description: The selected state color for elements with the highest level of prominence.

vivid/color/bg/surface/secondary.$description: The background color for elements with a secondary level of prominence.

vivid/color/bg/surface/tertiary.$description: The background color for elements with a tertiary level of prominence.

vivid/color/bg/surface/neutral.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/surface/primary.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/surface/announcement.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/surface/info.$description: Use to apply the info color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/surface/success.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/surface/warning.$description: Use to apply the warning color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/surface/danger.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/disabled.$description: The disabled color for smaller elements, like buttons

vivid/color/bg/fill/neutral.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/neutral/hover.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/neutral/active.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/neutral/strong.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/fill/neutral/strong/hover.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/neutral/strong/activ.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/primary.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/primary/hover.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/primary/active.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/primary/strong.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/fill/primary/strong/hover.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/primary/strong/activ.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/announcement.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/announcement/hover.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/announcement/active.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/announcement/strong.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/fill/announcement/strong/.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.
Use to apply the announcement color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/success.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/success/hover.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/success/active.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/success/strong.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/fill/success/strong/hover.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/success/strong/activ.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/danger.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/danger/hover.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/danger/active.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/danger/strong.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/fill/danger/strong/hover.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/danger/strong/active.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

vivid/color/bg/fill/info.$description: Use to apply the info color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/info/strong.$description: Use to apply the info color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/fill/warning.$description: Use to apply the warning color to elements.

vivid/color/bg/fill/warning/strong.$description: Use to apply the warning color to elements with high emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/backdrop.$description: A semi transparent background color for backdrops (eg. dialog component)
